title: cyperus heterocladus
intro: Cyperus heterocladus, also known as umbrella sedge or umbrella papyrus, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Cyperus heterocladus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be prepared by boiling the roots and rhizomes in water.
